mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM oa_notice WHERE del_flag = 0
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE oa_notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_notice WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY publish_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO oa_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, NOW())
